title: National Guard Counterdrug Program Adapts to Evolving Criminal Threats
description: The National Guard Counterdrug Program helps law enforcement connect investigations and share intelligence to stop sophisticated drug trafficking networks across the country.

body.text: Drug trafficking networks often cross state and international borders, and analysts with the National Guard Counterdrug Program are helping law enforcement officials identify trafficking routes and connect investigations across jurisdictions to disrupt and stop the flow of illicit drugs.

Soldiers assigned to the Arizona Army National Guard and a U.S. Customs and Border Protection agent inspect a cooler of fish for illegal drugs and other contraband at the Dennis DeConcini Port of Entry in Nogales, Ariz., April 30, 2025. The Arizona National Guard and CBP are working together to interdict drugs at Arizona's ports of entry.
